message:
🌱 minio: remove a bucket from gui?  (#1287)

* 🌱 Add minio: remove a bucket from gui?  mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct minio namespace to minio-operator

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "minio-4166-remove-a-bucket-from-gui",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "minio: remove a bucket from gui? ",
+    "description": "remove a bucket from gui? . This issue affects 15+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your minio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio-operator --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review minio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant minio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n minio-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl get configmap -n minio-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio\n```\nIn the minio webapp, why there is no way to delete a bucket from the graphical interface?"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for remove a bucket from gui? ",
+        "description": "This PR (two commits, one functionality + one UI from  ) adds the ability to delete a bucket from the web UI. The bucket must be empty for the `DeleteBucket` RPC call to succeed. There is no confirmation on the UI because deleting an empty bucket is reversible (just create a new one).\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm remove a bucket from gui?  is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio-operator --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n minio-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR (two commits, one functionality + one UI from  ) adds the ability to delete a bucket from the web UI. The bucket must be empty for the `DeleteBucket` RPC call to succeed. There is no confirmation on the UI because deleting an empty bucket is reversible (just create a new one).",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
